inputs.label: Expansion Point (a)
inputs.businessContext: The point about which the Taylor series is expanded.

businessContext_i18n.en: The point about which the Taylor series is expanded.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Punkt, um den die Taylor-Reihe entwickelt wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Point autour duquel la série de Taylor est développée
businessContext_i18n.es: Punto alrededor del cual se expande la serie de Taylor.

inputs.label: Evaluation Point (x)
inputs.businessContext: The point at which the function is approximated.

businessContext_i18n.en: The point at which the function is approximated.

inputs.label: Polynomial Degree
inputs.businessContext: Highest order of the Taylor polynomial (0–3).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Ordre le plus élevé du polynôme de Taylor (0–3).
businessContext_i18n.es: Orden más alto del polinomio de Taylor (0–3).

inputs.businessContext: Function value at the expansion point.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de la fonction au point d'expansion.
